response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior engineer, but he does not meet the role's mandatory requirements. His professional C++ exposure amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. His database background is MySQL/MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and he has no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience — RIDE Capital was a retail investment fintech, not a capital-markets environment. His strengths in web, TypeScript, and DLang systems work do not transfer to this specialized consulting engagement.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, desktop, mobile, and embedded systems
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work (millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong communication skills: fluent English, conference talks, and multi-day workshops he designed and taught
concerns: Professional C++ experience is limited to about seven months in 2014-2015, versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL background is MySQL/MongoDB
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and performance-systems background
